title: ATLAS Development Data Bundle Manifest
description: Specification for the manifest written by the Colab dev-data-bundle packaging script and consumed by the repository bootstrap script. The manifest is the single source of truth for what a released development-data bundle contains and how to verify it. It must never contain fabricated values: every field is either measured directly from a real production file at packaging time or copied verbatim from the authoritative schema catalog under atlas_reference/schemas/.

bundle_name.description: Stable identifier for this bundle family, e.g. 'atlas-dev-data-bundle'.

bundle_version.description: Semantic version of this bundle. Must match the GitHub Release tag (e.g. v1.2.0 -> 1.2.0).

created_utc.description: UTC timestamp the bundle was packaged, ISO-8601.

colab_project_root.description: The Google Drive project root the artifacts were read from at packaging time, e.g. /content/drive/MyDrive/Project_Atlas.

source_repository.description: owner/repo of the Project ATLAS repository this bundle was packaged against.

source_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the repository checkout used to determine the required-artifacts list, if known.

packaging_engine_version.description: Version identifier of the packaging script that produced this manifest.

part_files.description: Ordered list of compressed archive part filenames if the bundle was split. Empty or omitted when the bundle fits in a single archive under the size ceiling.

archive_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the single, unsplit archive before any splitting was applied. Used by the bootstrap script to verify reassembled parts.

max_part_size_bytes.description: Ceiling used when splitting the archive. Must be strictly less than 2147483648 (2 GiB).

artifact_count.description: Number of entries in 'artifacts'. Must equal len(artifacts).

artifact_id.description: Stable slug matching the artifact_id in atlas_reference/dev_data_bundle_required_artifacts.json.

original_production_path.description: Path relative to the Colab Google Drive Project_Atlas root, e.g. data/game_intelligence/clean_bullpen_pregame_facts/2025/clean_bullpen_pregame_facts.parquet.

bundled_relative_path.description: Path of the file inside the staged bundle/archive, mirroring original_production_path under a 'data/' prefix.

file_size_bytes.description: Exact size in bytes, measured from the real file at packaging time.

row_count.description: Exact row count, measured from the real file at packaging time (e.g. via pyarrow.parquet.ParquetFile metadata or a CSV line count).

column_count.description: Exact column count, measured from the real file at packaging time.

primary_key.description: Column(s) that form the artifact's unique grain, e.g. ['game_pk', 'team']. Must never be a player-name column when a player-id column exists.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the file's exact bytes, computed at packaging time.

season.description: The ATLAS season the artifact pertains to, or 'multi_season' for shared/unpartitioned artifacts.

purpose.description: Short human-readable statement of why this artifact is required and which builder/phase consumes it.

schema_reference.description: Relative path under atlas_reference/schemas/ describing this artifact's authoritative contract, if one exists.
